UserProgress.title: UserProgress
UserProgress.description: Durable schema tracking candidate DSA problem solving, topic progression, streaks, and interview revisions.

uid.description: The unique Firebase Authentication user ID.

completedTopics.description: List of topic IDs that the user has completed.

solvedProblems.description: List of problem IDs that the user has solved.

lastActiveDate.description: ISO string of the last activity timestamp.

weakAreas.description: List of topic IDs flagged as weak.

revisionStatus.description: Dictionary of revision status per topic ID.

problemNotes.description: Dictionary mapping problem ID to user-saved notes content.

users/{userId}.description: Collection of user-scoped progress entities containing progress on topics and problem completion states.
